statistical_sentences: R gives a value range in [0, 1] with 0 representing no phase synchrony (asynchronous state) and R = 1 when full synchronization occurs.
methods_sentences: The neural mass models which are based on the mesoscopic scale, describe the action of neural populations rather than the behavior of spiking neurons and have been used broadly in modeling some brain activities such as epilepsy [3], sleep [4], and human alpha rhythm (∼ 8-∼12 Hz) [5].
